customfield_11772.value:
h1. *Negative Testing Flows:*

#  Verify FlowSpec table is accessible for VRF : 
  Command:  show flowspec instance vrf KK ipv4
  Expected: Command succeeds, shows installed rules (or empty if none)

 2.  Query with exact destination match (positive control) : 
  Command:  show flowspec instance vrf KK ipv4 destination 10.10.10.1/32
  Expected: Returns the matching rule (if installed with that exact prefix)

#  Query with non-matching destination (negative test) : 
  Command:  show flowspec instance vrf KK ipv4 destination 50.0.0.0/8
  Expected: Empty result / "No flows found" (exact-match only, no partial)
#  Query with non-matching source (negative test) : 
  Command:  show flowspec instance vrf KK ipv4 source 1.1.1.1/32
  Expected: Empty result / "No flows found" (if no rule has that exact source)
#  Query specific NLRI : 
  Command:  show flowspec instance vrf KK ipv4 nlri "DstPrefix:=10.10.10.1/32"
  Expected: Returns matching rule if exists, empty otherwise
